reference_images.label: umbra_scale_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Tower chamber palette, art deco framing, light beam composition, and shadow contrast anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use SpriteSheetBundle on the exit door entity and trigger the non looping sequence when the scale target state is satisfied.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load world/world_exit_door_opening_8f_64x96.png through AssetServer and advance frames during the unlocked animation event.
runtime_notes: Closed, opening, and open readability must remain clear from the default full floor camera.
The collision sensor becomes passable on frame 8 while the art stays aligned to the door frame anchor.
Gold trim glow can pulse during the final two frames without changing the sprite origin.

context.usage: Goal object that opens when the scale angle falls inside the target window and the shadow path stays traversable.

shape.silhouette: Tall art deco door with stepped gold frame, central iris seam, and a bright unlock slit that widens during the sequence.

specs.texture: Brushed metal trim, lacquered dark door panels, and thin inner glow accents.
specs.shading: Hard amber highlights travel from the seam toward the frame over the 8 frame sequence.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 512x96 px with eight 64x96 frames.
Frame 1 reads fully locked and frame 8 reads fully open with a minimum 24 px walkable gap.
The bottom threshold stays on one horizontal baseline across all frames so the collision handoff stays stable.
